comments: Keyed by Polish word. Only entries that need more than a literal depiction of the translation. The generation script falls back to the translation for any word not listed here.
Cześć: a cheerful cartoon character with an outstretched arm waving hello, big friendly smile, warm background
Dzień dobry: a smiling person waving at a golden sunrise over rooftops, morning light streaming in, welcoming gesture
Dobry wieczór: a person greeting at a doorway with a warm evening glow behind them, sunset sky visible through a window
Dobranoc: a person in cozy pajamas standing at a window showing a starry night sky and full moon, holding a candle
Do widzenia: a person standing in an open doorway waving goodbye with a warm smile, suitcase or hat in hand
Na razie: two friends parting ways on a street, both waving casually and smiling, relaxed body language
Tak: a bold green checkmark with a confident nodding figure beside it, clean white background
Nie: a clear red X mark with a figure shaking their head and palm facing outward, clean white background
Proszę: open cupped hands offering something forward with a gentle, polite expression
Dziękuję: a person pressing both hands together in gratitude with a sincere bow and warm smile
Przepraszam: a person with a genuinely apologetic expression, hand placed on their chest, slightly bowed head
Nie ma za co: a smiling person waving their hand dismissively as if to say 'don't mention it', relaxed and kind expression
Jak się masz?: two cartoon figures facing each other, one leaning in with a friendly question mark speech bubble
Dobrze, dziękuję: a cheerful person with a big thumbs up and broad smile, radiating contentment
Jak masz na imię?: a person pointing curiously at a blank name badge on another person's chest, friendly questioning expression
a person proudly pointing to themselves with a name badge on their chest showing a blank name line
Miło mi: two people shaking hands warmly with genuine smiles, a small glowing connection between them
Nie rozumiem: a person with a puzzled expression surrounded by floating question marks, tilting their head in confusion
Czy mówisz po angielsku?: a person with a speech bubble containing a British flag and a question mark, looking hopeful
Powtórz proszę: a speech bubble with a circular repeat arrow inside it, patient expression on a person's face
dzisiaj: a calendar page with today's date circled in red with a bold highlight
jutro: a calendar showing tomorrow's date with a forward-pointing arrow and a hopeful sunrise in the background
wczoraj: a calendar page with yesterday's date faded slightly, a backward-pointing arrow, gentle nostalgia
Jestem głodny: a person holding their empty stomach with a longing expression, thought bubble showing a bowl of steaming food
Jestem głodna: a person holding their empty stomach with a longing expression, thought bubble showing a bowl of steaming food
Jestem spragniony: a person with dry cracked lips reaching desperately toward a tall glass of cool water
Chciałbym coś zjeść: a person gesturing toward an empty plate at a table with a hopeful expression and raised eyebrows
Chciałabym coś zjeść: a person gesturing toward an empty plate at a table with a hopeful expression and raised eyebrows
Chciałbym coś do picia: a person holding up an empty glass toward a waiter with a polite requesting expression
Jestem zmęczony: a person with heavy drooping eyelids, slouched posture, dark circles under eyes, stumbling slightly
Chcę spać: a person in pajamas hugging a large pillow with eyes half-closed, a crescent moon and soft stars overhead
Jestem chory: a person tucked in bed with a thermometer in their mouth, blanket pulled up, looking pale and unwell
Potrzebuję pomocy: a person raising both arms urgently with a distress expression, SOS symbol floating above them
Boli mnie głowa: a person pressing both hands to their temples with pain lines radiating from their head, wincing
Gdzie jest toaleta?: a person looking around anxiously in a public space, WC signage visible in the distance, urgent expression
Zimno mi: a person wrapped tightly in a coat and scarf, visibly shivering with snowflakes swirling around them
Gorąco mi: a person fanning themselves furiously with sweat drops on their forehead, a blazing sun overhead
Jestem szczęśliwy: a person jumping for joy with arms raised, huge smile, colorful confetti bursting around them
Jestem smutny: a person sitting alone with slumped shoulders, downturned mouth, a single tear on their cheek
Jestem przestraszony: a person stumbling backward with wide eyes and hands raised in alarm, shadow of something frightening nearby
Dobrze się bawię: a person laughing with abandon at a party, confetti flying, arms raised in delight, surrounded by friends
śniadanie: a warm breakfast table scene with a soft-boiled egg in a cup, toast with butter, a steaming coffee mug, morning sunlight streaming in
obiad: a family dinner table set with a bowl of soup, a main course plate, bread, and a glass of water, midday lighting
kolacja: an intimate supper table lit by candles with a nicely plated meal, wine glasses, soft evening atmosphere
bigos: a rustic clay pot filled with rich brown stew, visible chunks of cabbage and sausage, steam rising, wooden spoon resting on the rim
pierogi: a plate of plump half-moon dumplings with crimped edges, lightly golden, served with a dollop of sour cream and sprinkle of fried onion
praca: an office building exterior with a briefcase, or a person at a tidy desk with a computer in a well-lit office
rynek: a charming European town square with cobblestones, market stalls with colorful awnings, a central fountain, and a church tower in the background
pieszo: a person walking cheerfully along a path, leaving a trail of footprints behind them
bilet: a colorful transit ticket or train boarding pass, clearly printed with route details, held in a hand
być: a glowing silhouette of a person standing confidently, radiating a soft aura of existence, simple and iconic
mieć: a person holding several objects in their arms with a satisfied ownership expression, surrounded by their belongings
chcieć: a person reaching eagerly toward something just out of grasp, stars of desire in their eyes, leaning forward with longing
lubić: a person gazing at something they enjoy with a warm, happy expression and a small glowing heart nearby
kochać: two people in a warm embrace with a large soft heart glowing between them
iść: a person walking purposefully forward leaving footprints, motion lines showing movement
jechać: a person behind a steering wheel of a vehicle moving forward, landscape passing by the window
jeść: a person happily eating at a table, fork raised, delighted expression, plate full of colorful food
pić: a person tilting a glass to their lips and drinking, refreshed expression, droplets catching light

widzieć: a wide-open eye with light rays extending outward, or a person shielding their eyes and looking into the distance
słyszeć: a large detailed ear with curved sound waves radiating toward it, attentive expression
kupować: a person at a shop counter handing over coins while receiving a paper bag with goods
płacić: a hand extending a credit card across a counter, payment terminal visible, transaction in progress

mieszkać: a person standing in front of their cozy home holding a key, warm light in the windows

dzwonić: a hand holding a ringing smartphone to an ear, sound waves indicating an active call
czekać: a person sitting on a bench checking their watch with a patient expression, clock on the wall showing time passing

otwierać: a hand turning a door handle as a door swings open, light streaming through the opening
zamykać: a hand firmly pushing a door shut, a key turning in a lock
duży: a giant elephant standing next to a tiny mouse for dramatic size comparison, scale clearly shown
mały: a tiny mouse sitting beside a large object, emphasizing its smallness
dobry: a person with a warm open smile giving a thumbs up, surrounded by a soft green glow
zły: a dark storm cloud over a frowning face, or a person with furrowed brows and a general air of displeasure
piękny: a stunning colorful butterfly resting on a blooming flower, radiant and delicate
brzydki: a wilted drooping flower with dull colors, or a disheveled object looking neglected
szybki: a cheetah in full sprint with intense motion blur, or a racing car leaving a trail of speed lines
wolny: a snail moving at an almost imperceptible pace along a leaf, taking its time
nowy: a shiny product fresh in its box with packaging tape just removed, a starburst NEW label, gleaming and pristine
stary: an ancient cracked scroll or a very worn old book with yellowed pages and faded writing
drogi: a luxury item with an elaborate price tag showing many zeros, gleaming presentation box
tani: a bright sale sticker with a slashed-through original price, bargain bin feel, cheerful discount energy
gorący: intense orange flames rising from a surface, heat shimmer visible in the air above
zimny: a glass coated in frost with ice crystals forming on the outside, cold condensation dripping
ciepły: a glowing fireplace in a cozy room, or a pair of hands wrapped around a steaming mug in soft warm light
pusty: a completely empty bowl with light reflecting off its interior, nothing inside whatsoever
pełny: a bowl so full it is overflowing, abundance visually spilling over the edges
łatwy: a person breezing through a simple task with a relaxed smile, barely any effort, task looks trivially simple
trudny: a person straining to carry an enormous heavy load uphill, effort and struggle visible in every muscle
ważny: a bold red exclamation mark on a starred official document, urgency and significance radiating from it
teraz: a clock with a bold arrow pointing exactly to NOW, a lightning bolt emphasizing immediacy
później: a clock face with a dashed arrow sweeping forward into a later hour
wcześniej: a clock face with an arrow sweeping backward to an earlier time
zawsze: a clock cycling in an infinite loop, infinity symbol overlaid, suggesting endless repetition

czasem: a pendulum clock swinging halfway between two positions, caught in the middle
rano: a rooster crowing at a bright orange sunrise over a misty meadow, fresh morning energy
po południu: a bright sun high in a clear sky, a person outside squinting in the midday brightness
wieczorem: a warm golden sunset silhouette with a person relaxing on a bench, orange and pink sky
w nocy: a deep indigo sky full of stars with a crescent moon, a sleeping city below
za chwilę: a nearly empty hourglass with the last few grains of sand falling through

zła pogoda: a turbulent stormy scene with dark clouds, heavy rain, lightning bolt in the distance, wind bending trees

brzuch: a person placing both hands gently on their belly, front-facing silhouette

internet: a glowing globe with luminous network lines connecting points across its surface, data streams flowing

WiFi: a router emitting curved WiFi signal arcs, glowing bars showing strong connection
